gpsNotificationBody: Your location is being shared during the route.
podSubmitFailed: Failed to submit POD. Please try again.
podUploadTimeout: The proof photo upload took too long. Check your connection and try again.
podPhotoTooLarge: The proof photo is too large. Maximum size is {maxSizeMb} MB.
cameraPermissionDenied: Camera access is required to capture POD.
arrivalFailed: Could not set arrival. Please try again.
notificationPermissionHint: Notifications must stay enabled so Android can keep route tracking active while the screen is locked.
notificationRequiredForTracking: Allow notifications for this app so Android can keep the GPS tracking service alive during active routes.
languageUpdateFailed: Could not update the app language.
offlineBanner: You are offline. Some actions will sync when connection returns.
offlineStartupMessage: We could not restore your session while the device is offline.
bootstrapFailed: We could not prepare the app. Please try again.
offlineRouteMessage: Route details are shown from the last successful load. Live actions need internet access.
offlineStartRoute: You need an internet connection to start the route.
offlineCompleteRoute: You need an internet connection to finish the route.
offlineStopAction: You need an internet connection to update this stop.
offlinePodSubmit: Proof of delivery is saved locally, but submission requires internet access.
podValidation: Add a receiver name or capture a photo before completing the stop.
actionQueuedForSync: Saved on this device. It will sync automatically when the connection is available.
gpsRequiredToStart: Enable GPS and grant foreground, background, and notification permission before starting route tracking.
batteryOptimizationHint: Some phones (Xiaomi, Samsung, Motorola, and others) stop tracking when the screen locks. Disable battery optimization for this app to keep GPS active during the route.
batteryOptimizationPromptTitle: Keep tracking while the screen is locked
batteryOptimizationPromptBody: To keep sending your location when the phone is locked, allow this app to run without battery restrictions. Tap Allow on the next screen.
trackingSendAuth: Session expired — reopen the app to sign in again
trackingDiagnosticsHint: Shows whether the GPS service is running and when the last location reached the server. Use this to check tracking on this device.
